entry.condition: Bullish confluence signal: EMA fast is above EMA slow, MACD line is above MACD signal, cooldown has passed, and Ichimoku bullish structure is confirmed unless loose mode is used.
entry.default_threshold: EMA 50 > EMA 200 + MACD 12/26/9 bullish; loose mode allows EMA + MACD only.

confirmation.condition: Strict confirmation requires close above the Ichimoku cloud, Tenkan above Kijun, close above Kijun, and optional RSI, histogram, cloud direction, volume, ADX, EMA200, and candle filters.
confirmation.default_threshold: RSI > 50 when enabled; volume > 20-period average x 1.2 when enabled; ADX > 25 when enabled.

take_profit.condition: Default fixed-percent take profit after a bullish confluence entry, with optional ATR-based reward target when ATR mode is enabled.

stop_loss.condition: Default fixed-percent stop loss after entry, with optional ATR-based stop when ATR mode is enabled. Opposite signal closes/reverses virtual trade logic in the original indicator.
